name: Direct Target Copy
boundary: prediction-time identical copy of current label
invalid: direct copy of y into X

name: Noisy Target Proxy
boundary: noisy linear function of current label
invalid: current label enters feature as signal+noise

name: Post-Outcome Aggregation
invalid: uses future labels not available at prediction time

name: Mixed Leakage
boundary: one contaminated + one legitimate injected duplicate
amendment: strict view removes only contaminated, retains legitimate
